creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193421
py-beautifulsoup-4.6.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-beautifulsoup to 4.6.0.

Changes by upstream:
- https://bazaar.launchpad.net/~leonardr/beautifulsoup/bs4/view/head:/NEWS.txt

Changes to the port:
- added LICENSE_FILE
- added NO_ARCH
- added DOCS option with appropriate dependencies

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
